creator: lehmann@ans-netz.de
text:
After configure, u must replace in ${WRKSRC}/Make.config

INSTALL_PROGRAM=install -c -s -o root -g wheel -m 555
with
INSTALL_PROGRAM=install -c -o root -g wheel -m 555

without these, the installation of shellscripts will fail 
(src/subtitles). Binarys are installed wit -s option flag automaticly (- 
s is added in the Makefile)

Greetings Olli
